question: Based on the chart, what can we say about the average energy usage for the entire week?

options.A: Unable to determine a reliable weekly average because data for all days are not actually available
options.B: About 39 kWh, averaging only the four days with visible bars
options.C: About 21 kWh, averaging all seven days shown in the chart
options.D: The average is exactly 40 kWh because the bars appear roughly similar in height

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
